summary: Integrated all card components into unified feed screen with filtering and pull-to-refresh. Added FlatList performance optimizations for 60fps scrolling. Created comprehensive test suite with 54 test cases covering all acceptance criteria. All quality gates passed (typecheck, lint, tests).

acceptance_criteria.description: FeedScreen with findings renders FlatList with FeedCard components
acceptance_criteria.evidence: Uses WhatsNewFindingCard for rendering findings, test validates renderItem implementation

acceptance_criteria.description: User pulls down on FlatList fires onRefresh callback (Generating new report message)
acceptance_criteria.evidence: RefreshControl with onRefresh={refresh}, ActivityIndicator + 'Generating new report...' banner

acceptance_criteria.description: User selects category filter filters feed to selected category
acceptance_criteria.evidence: SubscriptionFeedFilters component with category selection, toCategoryArg maps filter to hook
FeedItemSkeleton components (x3) shown during isLoading state
5 FlatList optimizations: removeClippedSubviews, maxToRenderPerBatch, updateCellsBatchingPeriod, initialNumToRender, windowSize

acceptance_criteria.description: FeedScreen with error shows error message with retry button
acceptance_criteria.evidence: ListEmptyComponent shows 'No reports yet' + 'Pull down to generate your first briefing'
